reference: I have had burning in the balls of my feet on and off for a year. It seemed to go away for about four months and is now back. I sit and elevate my feet and use ice. I am a fifty-five-year-old woman, five feet six inches tall, one hundred and forty pounds. I have had both hips replaced and I have fibromyalgia, along with chronic acid reflux, chronic cystitis, degenerative disc disease, and chronic migraines. I take gabapentin, Celebrex, and Dexilant, along with an omega-three supplement. I started Botox in February for my shoulders and head. What do I need to do? Is this something I should check with my doctor?

I take gabapentin, Celebrex, and Excellent, along with an omega-3 supplement. I started Botox in February for my shoulders and head. What do I need to do?
